info.title: mk-clock-adult API
info.description: Local HTTP API for mk-clock-adult. All routes are directly available on the trusted home network.

get.description: Returns live display, audio, bedtime, touch, font, AHT10 room-sensor, weather, and alarm state. The room_sensor object reports sensor status, device, address, timing, temperature, humidity, timestamp, and the latest error.
Returns the active IPv4 interface, address, hostname, Wi-Fi SSID and signal, plus network-time synchronization state.

selected.description: Uploaded filename, stable system-font key, or empty for a built-in OLED font.

get.description: Returns built-in OLED fonts, installed Linux fonts, uploaded fonts, and the active selection.

get.summary: Read an uploaded or Linux system font
get.description: Supply either file for an uploaded font or key for a stable system-font key returned by the font list.

post.summary: Upload one or more MP3 files for sequential asynchronous optimization

202.description: Files accepted as one processing batch

400.description: No valid MP3 files or unsupported settings

409.description: A batch is already queued or processing, or the job queue lacks capacity
The same filename is still processing

503.description: Deleted, but the clock core could not be notified

post.summary: Upload a TTF or OTF font

oled_font_file.description: Uploaded font filename, stable system-font key, or an empty string to use the selected built-in OLED font.

weather_warning_chime_enabled.description: Use 1 to play the protected built-in message chime when a new non-empty Weather warning type appears.

weather_warning_chime_during_bedtime.description: Use 1 to allow Weather warning chimes during the configured bedtime window; use 0 to silence them during bedtime.

post.description: Pushes the ECCC location, resolved current conditions, and three independently configured panel slots to the C core. Each slot explicitly states whether its temperature is available, so missing data is never represented as 0°C.

location.description: Weather location name displayed above the clock in the OLED Weather dashboard.

current_temperature_c.description: Resolved current outside temperature. Uses the ECCC observation when available, otherwise the nearest hourly forecast.

current_temperature_available.description: 1 when a current outside temperature is available from either an observation or the nearest hourly forecast.

current_temperature_is_forecast.description: 1 when current_temperature_c was obtained from the nearest hourly forecast because currentConditions did not contain a temperature.

humidity_available.description: 1 when relative humidity was present in ECCC currentConditions. Hourly forecast data is not used to invent humidity.

slot0_kind.description: Panel source kind. ROOM is rendered from the local AHT10; OUTSIDE and forecast use weather slot data.

slot0_date_label.description: Optional uppercase date displayed when the selected forecast falls on a later local date.

slot0_temperature_available.description: 1 when slotN_temperature_c is valid. A missing temperature is displayed as --° rather than 0°C.

slot0_temperature_c.description: Panel temperature when slotN_temperature_available is 1. Ignored for ROOM rendering.

slot0_precipitation_probability_percent.description: Hourly probability of precipitation. Ignored for ROOM rendering; zero hides the percentage on the OLED.

slot0_icon.description: Weather icon for OUTSIDE or forecast. ROOM uses the AHT10 sensor-state sprite.

slot1_kind.description: Panel source kind. ROOM is rendered from the local AHT10; OUTSIDE and forecast use weather slot data.

slot1_date_label.description: Optional uppercase date displayed when the selected forecast falls on a later local date.

slot1_temperature_available.description: 1 when slotN_temperature_c is valid. A missing temperature is displayed as --° rather than 0°C.

slot1_temperature_c.description: Panel temperature when slotN_temperature_available is 1. Ignored for ROOM rendering.

slot1_precipitation_probability_percent.description: Hourly probability of precipitation. Ignored for ROOM rendering; zero hides the percentage on the OLED.

slot1_icon.description: Weather icon for OUTSIDE or forecast. ROOM uses the AHT10 sensor-state sprite.

slot2_kind.description: Panel source kind. ROOM is rendered from the local AHT10; OUTSIDE and forecast use weather slot data.

slot2_date_label.description: Optional uppercase date displayed when the selected forecast falls on a later local date.

slot2_temperature_available.description: 1 when slotN_temperature_c is valid. A missing temperature is displayed as --° rather than 0°C.

slot2_temperature_c.description: Panel temperature when slotN_temperature_available is 1. Ignored for ROOM rendering.

slot2_precipitation_probability_percent.description: Hourly probability of precipitation. Ignored for ROOM rendering; zero hides the percentage on the OLED.

slot2_icon.description: Weather icon for OUTSIDE or forecast. ROOM uses the AHT10 sensor-state sprite.

warning_type.description: Highest-priority active ECCC warning type displayed in the OLED footer marquee. Empty when no warning is active.

get.summary: Read the ECCC GeoMet city-item URL

500.description: Weather source could not be read

post.summary: Save the ECCC GeoMet city-item URL

get.summary: Read the latest weather refresh result and activity history

500.description: Weather activity could not be read

get.description: Returns independent source selections for all three OLED weather panels.

mode.description: room = local AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback when observations are unavailable; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead
room = local AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback when observations are unavailable; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead
room = local AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback when observations are unavailable; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead

post.description: Each panel may independently show ROOM, current OUTSIDE conditions, or an hourly forecast from 1 to 48 hours ahead. Selections may repeat.

slot1_mode.description: room = local AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback when observations are unavailable; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead

slot2_mode.description: room = local AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback when observations are unavailable; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead

slot3_mode.description: room = local AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback when observations are unavailable; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead

200.description: Panel settings saved and weather refresh requested
